description: Default rules applied to ALL buyers unless overridden

rules.name: Consumption Required for Fabric
rules.description: All fabric and interlining items must have consumption per garment specified

action.alert: WARNING: Fabric consumption must be specified for costing

rules.name: Care Label Required
rules.description: Every garment must have a Care/Content Label (washing instructions)

action.alert_if_missing: ERROR: Care label is mandatory for all garments

rules.name: Main Label Required
rules.description: Every garment must have a brand / main label

action.alert_if_missing: ERROR: Main brand label is mandatory

rules.name: Polybag Required for Packing
rules.description: Individual polybag is required for most garments
